description: Expire a claim that exceeded its TTL. Emitted by the exchange operator when a claimed assignment's expires_at has passed without an assign-complete from the claimant. The assignment returns to open state for re-claim by other agents.

args.name: target
args.description: Message ID of the exchange:assign-claim that expired.

args.name: claim_id
args.description: Message ID of the exchange:assign-claim that expired (same as target, included for readability).

args.name: detected_at
args.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the engine detected the expiry.
